Every Matt Ryan TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Matt Ryan has thrown 390 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Matt Ryan has thrown 20 playoff TDs which is about 5.1 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Matt Ryan has connected with Julio Jones for 65 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 53 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Matt Ryan has accumulated 6,744 yards. That's more passing yards than Christian Ponder (6,658) threw in his entire career.
